# pai project

> Alias for `pai projects`

## Synopsis

```
pai project <subcommand> [options]
```

## Subcommands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`pai project list`](#pai-project-list) | Show the unified deduped listing (same as `pai`). |
| [`pai project list-raw`](#pai-project-list-raw) | Raw registry listing with slug, path, status, last_active columns |
| [`pai project cd <identifier>`](#pai-project-cd-identifier) | cd to a project directory. Short form: pai cd <name> |
| [`pai project add <path>`](#pai-project-add-path) | Register a project directory in the PAI registry |
| [`pai project info <slug>`](#pai-project-info-slug) | Show full details for a project |
| [`pai project archive <slug>`](#pai-project-archive-slug) | Archive a project |
| [`pai project unarchive <slug>`](#pai-project-unarchive-slug) | Restore an archived project to active status |
| [`pai project move <slug> <new-path>`](#pai-project-move-slug-new-path) | Update the root path for a project |
| [`pai project rebind <slug> <new-path>`](#pai-project-rebind-slug-new-path) | Manually update the root_path for a project (for when auto-detect found multiple matches). |
| [`pai project tag <slug> <tags...>`](#pai-project-tag-slug-tags) | Add one or more tags to a project |
| [`pai project alias <slug> <alias>`](#pai-project-alias-slug-alias) | Register an alternative slug for a project |
| [`pai project edit <slug>`](#pai-project-edit-slug) | Edit project metadata |
| [`pai project detect [path]`](#pai-project-detect-path) | Detect which registered project the given path (or CWD) belongs to |
| [`pai project health`](#pai-project-health) | Audit all registered projects: check which paths still exist, find moved/dead projects |
| [`pai project consolidate <identifier>`](#pai-project-consolidate-identifier) | Consolidate scattered ~/.claude/projects/.../Notes/ directories for a project into its canonical Notes/ location |
| [`pai project promote`](#pai-project-promote) | Promote a session note into a new standalone project |
| [`pai project go <query>`](#pai-project-go-query) | Print the root path for a project by slug, partial name, or fuzzy match. |
| [`pai project name <identifier> <shortname>`](#pai-project-name-identifier-shortname) | Give a project a short name for quick access |
| [`pai project unname <shortname>`](#pai-project-unname-shortname) | Remove a project's short name |
| [`pai project names`](#pai-project-names) | List named projects (your curated shortlist) |
| [`pai project config [identifier]`](#pai-project-config-identifier) | View or modify session launch config for a project. |

### pai project list

Show the unified deduped listing (same as `pai`).

Use --all to include cold / zero-session / archived projects.

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--all` | Show all entries including cold / zero-session / archived projects |  |
| `-n, --n <count>` | Max rows to show | `20` |


### pai project list-raw

Raw registry listing with slug, path, status, last_active columns

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--all` | Include archived projects (default: active only) |  |
| `--status <status>` | Filter by status: active \| archived |  |
| `--tag <tag>` | Filter by tag |  |
| `--type <type>` | Filter by type |  |


### pai project cd <identifier>

cd to a project directory. Short form: pai cd <name>

(The shell wrapper handles the actual cd; pure output here.)
Auto-detects moved projects when the registered path no longer exists.

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<identifier>` | required |


### pai project add <path>

Register a project directory in the PAI registry

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<path>` | required |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--slug <slug>` | Override auto-generated slug |  |
| `--type <type>` | Project type: local \| central \| obsidian-linked \| external | `local` |
| `--display-name <name>` | Human-readable display name |  |


### pai project info <slug>

Show full details for a project

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |


### pai project archive <slug>

Archive a project

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |


### pai project unarchive <slug>

Restore an archived project to active status

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |


### pai project move <slug> <new-path>

Update the root path for a project

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |
| `<new-path>` | required |


### pai project rebind <slug> <new-path>

Manually update the root_path for a project (for when auto-detect found multiple matches).

Validates the new path exists and is a directory, then updates the registry.

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |
| `<new-path>` | required |


### pai project tag <slug> <tags...>

Add one or more tags to a project

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |
| `<tags...>` | variadic |


### pai project alias <slug> <alias>

Register an alternative slug for a project

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |
| `<alias>` | required |


### pai project edit <slug>

Edit project metadata

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<slug>` | required |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--display-name <name>` | New display name |  |
| `--type <type>` | New type |  |


### pai project detect [path]

Detect which registered project the given path (or CWD) belongs to

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `[path]` | optional |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--json` | Output raw JSON instead of human-readable text |  |


### pai project health

Audit all registered projects: check which paths still exist, find moved/dead projects

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--fix` | Auto-remediate where possible |  |
| `--json` | Output raw JSON report |  |
| `--status <category>` | Filter output to: active \| stale \| dead |  |


### pai project consolidate <identifier>

Consolidate scattered ~/.claude/projects/.../Notes/ directories for a project into its canonical Notes/ location

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<identifier>` | required |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--yes` | Perform consolidation without confirmation prompt |  |
| `--dry-run` | Preview what would be moved without making changes |  |


### pai project promote

Promote a session note into a new standalone project

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--from-session <path>` | Path to the session note markdown file |  |
| `--to <path>` | Directory path for the new project (must not exist) |  |
| `--name <name>` | Display name for the new project (derived from filename if omitted) |  |


### pai project go <query>

Print the root path for a project by slug, partial name, or fuzzy match.

Designed for shell integration: cd $(pai projects go <query>)

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<query>` | required |


### pai project name <identifier> <shortname>

Give a project a short name for quick access

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<identifier>` | required |
| `<shortname>` | required |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--permission <level>` | Permission level: full \| trusted \| default |  |


### pai project unname <shortname>

Remove a project's short name

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `<shortname>` | required |


### pai project names

List named projects (your curated shortlist)

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--json` | Output JSON for AIBroker consumption |  |
| `--all` | Include ALL active registered projects, not just the named shortlist |  |


### pai project config [identifier]

View or modify session launch config for a project.

Use --options to discover available keys and presets.

**Arguments**

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `[identifier]` | optional |

**Options**

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--set <key=value...>` | Set config values (repeatable) | `` |
| `--unset <key...>` | Remove config keys (repeatable, use env.KEY for env vars) | `` |
| `--preset <name>` | Apply a permission preset: full \| trusted \| default |  |
| `--defaults` | Manage global session defaults instead of a project |  |
| `--options` | List available config keys and presets |  |
| `--json` | Output JSON |  |
| `--reset` | Reset config to empty (inherit global defaults) |  |
